fcba.a1_extension.specification: Characterize whether the dispute record supports: "The reflection on the periodic statement is of an extension of credit."

fcba.a1_not_consumer.specification: Characterize whether the dispute record supports: "The extension of credit was not made to the consumer."

fcba.a2_extension.specification: Characterize whether the dispute record supports: "The reflection on the periodic statement is of an extension of credit."

fcba.a2_not_per_1026_8.specification: Characterize whether the dispute record supports: "The extension of credit is not identified in accordance with the requirements of section 1026.8."

fcba.a6_extension.specification: Characterize whether the dispute record supports: "The reflection on the periodic statement is of an extension of credit."

fcba.a6_clarification_requested.specification: Characterize whether the dispute record supports: "The consumer requests additional clarification, including documentary evidence, regarding the extension of credit."

fcba.a1_not_authorized.specification: Characterize whether the dispute record supports: "The extension of credit was not made to a person with authority to use the consumer's credit card or open-end credit plan."

fcba.a2_not_per_1026_7.specification: Characterize whether the dispute record supports: "The extension of credit is not identified in accordance with the requirements of section 1026.7(a)(2) or (b)(2) as applicable."

fcba.a3_extension_property.specification: Characterize whether the dispute record supports: "The reflection on the periodic statement is of an extension of credit for property."

fcba.a3_extension_services.specification: Characterize whether the dispute record supports: "The reflection on the periodic statement is of an extension of credit for services."

fcba.a3_not_accepted.specification: Characterize whether the dispute record supports: "The property or services were not accepted by the consumer's party."

fcba.a3_not_delivered.specification: Characterize whether the dispute record supports: "The property or services were not delivered to the consumer's party as agreed."

fcba.a4_failure_to_credit.specification: Characterize whether the dispute record supports: "The periodic statement reflects the creditor's failure to credit properly a payment to the consumer's account."

fcba.a5_computational_error.specification: Characterize whether the dispute record supports: "The periodic statement reflects a computational error of an accounting nature made by the creditor."

fcba.a7_failure_to_deliver_statement.specification: Characterize whether the dispute record supports: "The creditor failed to deliver a periodic statement to the consumer."
